summary: Read-only plan for the 10 job-listed refs. The job marks #74163, #89724, #91107, #91176, #91438, #92081, and #92656 as security-signal refs, so those exact items are quarantined with route_security. The unrelated non-security work splits into separate Windows compatibility and QMD Windows path subclusters; no close, merge, fix, or PR-creation action is planned.

actions.reason: Security-signal refs are out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope.
